creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text: The issue is the update to llvm-4.0. With r316422, USB works fine. llvm-4.0 was MFCed in r316423 and USB is not working with that kernel.  The commit did not touch and USB specific code. Should dim and/or emaste be involved? I can't think pulling the update is reasonable, but losing USB support i pretty serious, too.
